overall.description: A static first-person view from a modern luxury bedroom overlooking a hazy futuristic cityscape through floor-to-ceiling windows. The scene appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a platform bed with white linens, contemporary furniture, and a prominent palm tree visible against the urban skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary first-person perspective from the bed, gazing out at the cityscape through the window

entered.detail: low-profile modern bed with white linens and pillows, occupying the foreground
large panoramic windows spanning the wall, offering view of the city
dense urban skyline with tall buildings visible through the hazy glass
single palm tree standing prominently against the city background
modern spherical bedside lamp on a stand
transparent glass partition wall separating the sleeping area
illuminated rectangular wall sconce on the left wall

segments.scene_description: A completely static shot from a first-person perspective lying on a modern platform bed in a luxury apartment. The room features minimalist design with dark walls and a large floor-to-ceiling window revealing a hazy, futuristic cityscape with a distinctive palm tree. No movement or action occurs throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a luxury bedroom that looks out over a hazy, futuristic urban horizon. It begins with a fixed view from a modern platform bed, emphasizing the minimalist design of the room and its dark walls. The gaze remains steady, drawing attention to the contrast between the intimate interior and the expansive floor-to-ceiling window. This stillness allows the eye to settle on the distant cityscape and a distinctive palm tree standing against the atmospheric haze.
